meta_title: For Freelancers: user onboarding to Solve can't debug code (Intermediate Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome can't debug code. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Debug Faster: AI-Driven User Onboarding for Freelancers
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with cryptic bugs. Learn to implement AI-driven user onboarding to streamline workflows and debug code faster using Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: When you can't debug code, the bottleneck is often a lack of observability in your user flows. By building an AI-orchestrated onboarding sequence, you capture edge-case telemetry and state transitions, allowing you to isolate failures instantly. Use Antigravity for architectural mapping and Claude Code for automated, context-aware bug remediation.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a screen at 2 AM. A client is waiting for a deploy, and your codebase feels like a labyrinth of unhandled exceptions. You haven't just lost the trail of a bug; you've lost the logic of the user's journey. The frustration of 'can't debug code' isn't a failure of skill—it's a failure of visibility.

But what if your application could explain its own friction? By architecting a robust, AI-integrated onboarding flow, you turn your users into active testers. We’re moving beyond simple tooltips; we are building a diagnostic layer that captures state, validates inputs, and uses AI to heal your production environment before the client even notices a glitch.

steps.title: Mapping the User Journey
steps.description: Before fixing bugs, identify where the onboarding flow diverges from expected states. Map the critical paths to pinpoint where data ingestion fails.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current user onboarding flow and generate a Mermaid diagram identifying potential state-mismatch points.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Generate a state machine diagram for the auth-to-dashboard onboarding flow'

steps.title: Implementing Diagnostic Hooks
steps.description: Inject telemetry hooks into your onboarding steps to capture context when an error occurs during user setup.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the onboarding component to include structured error logging that captures current user state and inputs.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit --file src/onboarding.js --instruction 'Add try-catch blocks with detailed logging for every step of the registration process'

steps.title: Automating Edge Case Validation
steps.description: Use AI to simulate diverse user profiles to ensure the onboarding logic doesn't break under weird data constraints.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a suite of edge-case test profiles for our onboarding validation logic.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Generate 5 JSON test profiles for onboarding with extreme data constraints and run them against the validation service'

steps.title: AI-Powered Error Resolution
steps.description: When an error hits, use Claude Code to analyze the stack trace against your newly created onboarding telemetry.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Explain the relationship between the recent onboarding failures and the state logs we captured.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask --context ./logs/onboarding_errors.json --question 'Identify the root cause of these onboarding failures'

steps.title: Finalizing Self-Healing Flows
steps.description: Implement a fallback mechanism that triggers when the AI detects a critical onboarding failure, preventing user churn.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a graceful fallback UI component that triggers when the main onboarding API returns a 5xx error.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit --file src/components/OnboardingFallback.tsx --instruction 'Implement a fallback UI that allows users to reset their progress if an error is detected'

pro_tips: Always store onboarding state in a local persistent cache so users can resume after a crash.
Use Claude Code to generate unit tests based on the actual error logs you captured, not just what you 'think' might break.
Tag every onboarding event with a unique 'UserSessionID' to correlate logs across disparate services.
Never let your AI rewrite core logic without a human-in-the-loop audit; use Antigravity to visualize the diffs first.
Treat your onboarding logs as a product feature; they provide the best user sentiment data available.
content.next_steps: Once your onboarding is stable, integrate a monitoring tool like Sentry to pipe these AI-generated logs directly into your dashboard.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting your code and start orchestrating your architecture. Join a community of elite freelancers shipping production-grade AI solutions daily. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
